name: SwCh TOSCA Codespace
postCreateCommand: set -e; curl -fsSL "https://dl.k8s.io/release/$(curl -fsSL https://dl.k8s.io/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl" -o /tmp/kubectl && sudo install -o root -g root -m 0755 /tmp/kubectl /usr/local/bin/kubectl && rm -f /tmp/kubectl && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install -e .
